name: statusline-usage-updater
description: Nightly auto-calibration of the statusline %w (weekly-quota burn) coefficient by comparing realized 7-day rate-limit utilization against realized cost-weighted session usage (output 5x input, cache-read 0.1x, 1h-write 2x). The session helper also emits non-idle Claude run-time and total raw token usage across the session and its subagents/workflows.
